nasb.text: Lift up a standard toward Zion! Seek refuge, do not stand still, For I am bringing evil from the north, And great destruction.

esv.text: Raise a standard toward Zion, flee for safety, stay not, for I bring disaster from the north, and great destruction.

cnv.text: 要向錫安豎起旗號， 趕快逃命，不可停留， 因為我必使災禍與嚴重的毀滅， 從北方而來。”

ccb.text: 你们要向锡安举起旗帜， 赶快逃亡，不要迟延， 因为我要从北方降下灾祸， 大肆毁灭。”
